# Lobre — Agentic Infrastructure Engine

> Pay-per-request utility infrastructure for autonomous AI agents.
> 19 endpoints across 3 bundles: trading data, code intelligence, NLP research.
> No sign-up. No API keys. Payment is the credential.
> Settlement: USDC via x402 (on-chain, Base mainnet).

## Onboarding

- [Onboard](https://lobre.lat/docs): Set up AgentCash wallet and add Lobre
- [OpenAPI spec](https://lobre.lat/api/openapi.json): Machine-readable contract with payment info
- [MCP server](https://lobre.lat/api/mcp): All 19 tools via Streamable HTTP Transport

## Trading Intelligence Endpoints

- [GET vitals](https://lobre.lat/api/v1/trading/engine/vitals): Live BTC/ETH price, 24h change, volume — $0.030
- [GET orderbook-depth](https://lobre.lat/api/v1/trading/engine/orderbook-depth): Orderbook bids/asks, spread, imbalance (?pair=) — $0.050
- [GET mev-risk-index](https://lobre.lat/api/v1/trading/engine/mev-risk-index): MEV sandwich attack risk score 0–100 for current Base block — $0.040
- [GET funding-rates](https://lobre.lat/api/v1/trading/engine/funding-rates): BTC/ETH/SOL perpetual futures funding rates (?symbols=) — $0.030
- [GET whale-tracker](https://lobre.lat/api/v1/trading/engine/whale-tracker): USDC transfers on Base above threshold (?threshold=) — $0.080
- [GET gas-tracker](https://lobre.lat/api/v1/trading/engine/gas-tracker): Gas prices (slow/standard/fast) for ETH, Base, Solana — $0.020
- [GET token-screener](https://lobre.lat/api/v1/trading/engine/token-screener): Top token movers by price change and volume — $0.050

## Coding Cache Endpoints

- [POST dependency-tree](https://lobre.lat/api/v1/coding/cache/dependency-tree): Import/export dependency graph from JS/TS source — $0.030
- [POST token-compressor](https://lobre.lat/api/v1/coding/cache/token-compressor): Strip comments and whitespace to minimize LLM token usage — $0.030
- [POST syntax-heartbeat](https://lobre.lat/api/v1/coding/cache/syntax-heartbeat): Validate JS/TS/JSX syntax, return parse errors with position hints — $0.030
- [POST refactor-suggest](https://lobre.lat/api/v1/coding/cache/refactor-suggest): Refactoring suggestions with severity ratings — $0.050
- [POST security-audit](https://lobre.lat/api/v1/coding/cache/security-audit): Security audit — SQL injection, XSS, hardcoded secrets — $0.060
- [POST secret-scanner](https://lobre.lat/api/v1/coding/cache/secret-scanner): Detect hardcoded API keys, private keys, tokens — $0.040

## Research Pruner Endpoints

- [POST sentiment](https://lobre.lat/api/v1/analysis/memory/sentiment): Classify text as positive, negative, or neutral — $0.030
- [POST heartbeat](https://lobre.lat/api/v1/analysis/memory/heartbeat): Cosine similarity between two texts — $0.030
- [POST entity-extractor](https://lobre.lat/api/v1/analysis/memory/entity-extractor): Extract named entities (persons, orgs, dates, locations, money) — $0.060
- [POST context-ranker](https://lobre.lat/api/v1/analysis/memory/context-ranker): Re-rank text chunks by semantic relevance to a query — $0.050
- [POST bias-detector](https://lobre.lat/api/v1/analysis/memory/bias-detector): Detect framing bias, sentiment slant, loaded language — $0.050
- [POST fact-linkage](https://lobre.lat/api/v1/analysis/memory/fact-linkage): Verify claims via fact-check database with LLM fallback — $0.120

---

# GET /api/v1/trading/engine/vitals
URL: https://lobre.lat/api/v1/trading/engine/vitals

Live BTC and ETH market vitals. Cached 10 seconds.

Price: $0.030 USDC
Method: GET
Request: Optional query param ?symbols=btc,eth (default: btc,eth — use "btc", "eth", or "btc,eth" to filter)
Response: { "success": true, "bundle": "trading_engine", "data": { "btc"?: { "price_usd": number, "change_24h_pct": number, "high_24h": number, "low_24h": number, "volume_24h": number }, "eth"?: { "price_usd": number, "change_24h_pct": number, "volume_24h": number }, "timestamp": number } }

---

# GET /api/v1/trading/engine/orderbook-depth
URL: https://lobre.lat/api/v1/trading/engine/orderbook-depth

Orderbook bids/asks for a trading pair. Returns spread (USD and %), top-10 depth on each side, and book imbalance (-1 to 1). Cached 5 seconds.

Price: $0.050 USDC
Method: GET
Request: Optional query param ?pair=ETH/USDT (default: BTC/USDT)
Response: { "success": true, "bundle": "trading_engine", "data": { "pair": string, "best_bid": number, "best_ask": number, "spread_usd": number, "spread_pct": number, "bid_depth_top10": number, "ask_depth_top10": number, "imbalance": number, "bids": [[price, qty], ...], "asks": [[price, qty], ...], "timestamp": number } }

---

# GET /api/v1/trading/engine/mev-risk-index
URL: https://lobre.lat/api/v1/trading/engine/mev-risk-index

MEV sandwich attack risk score (0–100) for the current Base mainnet block. Cached 30 seconds.

Price: $0.040 USDC
Method: GET
Request: No body required.
Response: { "success": true, "bundle": "trading_engine", "data": { "risk_score": number, "risk_level": "low"|"medium"|"high"|"critical", "block_number": number, "total_txs": number, "high_gas_ratio_pct": number, "timestamp": number } }

---

# GET /api/v1/trading/engine/funding-rates
URL: https://lobre.lat/api/v1/trading/engine/funding-rates

Perpetual futures funding rates for BTC, ETH, and SOL. Includes annualized rate and next funding timestamp. Cached 15 seconds.

Price: $0.030 USDC
Method: GET
Request: Optional query param ?symbols=BTC,ETH (default: all — BTC,ETH,SOL. Comma-separated filter.)
Response: { "success": true, "bundle": "trading_engine", "data": { "rates": [{ "symbol": string, "funding_rate": number, "rate_pct": string, "annualized_pct": number, "next_funding_ms": number, "mark_price": number }], "btc_annualized_pct": number, "timestamp": number } }

---

# GET /api/v1/trading/engine/whale-tracker
URL: https://lobre.lat/api/v1/trading/engine/whale-tracker

Recent large USDC transfers on Base mainnet above the configured threshold. On-chain data. Returns up to 25 most recent transfers. Cached 60 seconds.

Price: $0.080 USDC
Method: GET
Request: Optional query param ?threshold=500000 (default: 500000, minimum: 10000)
Response: { "success": true, "bundle": "trading_engine", "data": { "large_transfers": [{ "hash": string, "from": string, "to": string, "amount_usdc": number, "block_number": number, "age_seconds": number }], "total_found": number, "threshold_usd": number, "timestamp": number } }

---

# GET /api/v1/trading/engine/gas-tracker
URL: https://lobre.lat/api/v1/trading/engine/gas-tracker

Current gas prices for ETH, Base, and Solana — slow, standard, and fast tiers. Cached 15 seconds.

Price: $0.020 USDC
Method: GET
Request: No body required.
Response: { "success": true, "bundle": "trading_engine", "data": { "base": { "slow": number, "standard": number, "fast": number, "base_fee": number, "unit": "gwei" }|null, "eth": { "slow": number, "standard": number, "fast": number, "base_fee": number, "unit": "gwei" }|null, "solana": { "low": number, "medium": number, "high": number, "unit": "microlamports" }|null, "timestamp": number } }

---

# GET /api/v1/trading/engine/token-screener
URL: https://lobre.lat/api/v1/trading/engine/token-screener

Scan tokens by 24h price change and volume threshold. Returns top movers sorted by price change magnitude. Cached 60 seconds.

Price: $0.050 USDC
Method: GET
Request: Optional query params ?price_change_min=5&volume_change_min=1000000&limit=20
Response: { "success": true, "bundle": "trading_engine", "data": { "screened": [{ "symbol": string, "name": string, "price": number, "change_24h_pct": number, "direction": "up"|"down", "volume_24h_usd": number, "high_24h": number, "low_24h": number, "market_cap": number }], "count": number, "filters": { "price_change_min_pct": number, "volume_24h_min_usd": number }, "timestamp": number } }

---

# POST /api/v1/coding/cache/dependency-tree
URL: https://lobre.lat/api/v1/coding/cache/dependency-tree

Parse static import and export dependency graph from JavaScript or TypeScript source code. Supports TypeScript, JSX, and ES modules.

Price: $0.030 USDC
Method: POST
Request body: { "code": string (required), "filename": string (optional, e.g. "server.ts") }
Response: { "success": true, "bundle": "coding_cache", "data": { "imports": string[], "exports": string[], "depth": number } }

---

# POST /api/v1/coding/cache/token-compressor
URL: https://lobre.lat/api/v1/coding/cache/token-compressor

Strip comments (single-line and multi-line) and collapse whitespace from source code to minimize LLM token usage.

Price: $0.030 USDC
Method: POST
Request body: { "raw_code": string (required) }
Response: { "success": true, "bundle": "coding_cache", "data": { "compressed": string, "ratio_pct": number, "original_bytes": number, "compressed_bytes": number } }

---

# POST /api/v1/coding/cache/syntax-heartbeat
URL: https://lobre.lat/api/v1/coding/cache/syntax-heartbeat

Validate JavaScript, TypeScript, or JSX syntax. Returns parse errors with position hints and line count.

Price: $0.030 USDC
Method: POST
Request body: { "code": string (required) }
Response: { "success": true, "bundle": "coding_cache", "data": { "valid": boolean, "errors": string[], "warnings": string[], "lines": number } }

---

# POST /api/v1/coding/cache/refactor-suggest
URL: https://lobre.lat/api/v1/coding/cache/refactor-suggest

AI-powered code review providing refactoring suggestions with severity ratings and overall quality score.

Price: $0.050 USDC
Method: POST
Request body: { "code": string (required), "language": string (optional, default: "typescript") }
Response: { "success": true, "bundle": "coding_cache", "data": { "suggestions": [{ "type": string, "line_hint": number|null, "description": string, "severity": "low"|"medium"|"high" }], "overall_quality": "poor"|"fair"|"good"|"excellent", "summary": string } }

---

# POST /api/v1/coding/cache/security-audit
URL: https://lobre.lat/api/v1/coding/cache/security-audit

AI-powered static security audit detecting SQL injection, XSS, insecure eval, hardcoded secrets, and other vulnerability patterns. Returns risk score 0–100 and severity-rated findings.

Price: $0.060 USDC
Method: POST
Request body: { "code": string (required), "language": string (optional, default: "typescript") }
Response: { "success": true, "bundle": "coding_cache", "data": { "vulnerabilities": [{ "id": string, "severity": "low"|"medium"|"high"|"critical", "title": string, "description": string, "line_hint": number|null, "recommendation": string }], "risk_score": number, "summary": string } }

---

# POST /api/v1/coding/cache/secret-scanner
URL: https://lobre.lat/api/v1/coding/cache/secret-scanner

Detect hardcoded secrets in source code using pattern matching — API keys, private keys, passwords, and tokens across 16+ types.

Price: $0.040 USDC
Method: POST
Request body: { "code": string (required), "strict": boolean (optional, default: false) }
Response: { "success": true, "bundle": "coding_cache", "data": { "secrets_found": [{ "type": string, "line": number, "severity": "medium"|"high"|"critical", "match_hint": string, "recommendation": string }], "risk_level": "NONE"|"MEDIUM"|"HIGH"|"CRITICAL", "total_found": number, "scanned_lines": number, "timestamp": number } }

---

# POST /api/v1/analysis/memory/sentiment
URL: https://lobre.lat/api/v1/analysis/memory/sentiment

Classify text sentiment as positive, negative, or neutral with confidence score and dominant emotion.

Price: $0.030 USDC
Method: POST
Request body: { "text": string (required, max ~2000 chars) }
Response: { "success": true, "bundle": "live_vector_pruner", "data": { "sentiment": "positive"|"negative"|"neutral", "confidence": number, "dominant_emotion": string|null, "brief_reason": string|null, "char_count": number, "timestamp": number } }

---

# POST /api/v1/analysis/memory/heartbeat
URL: https://lobre.lat/api/v1/analysis/memory/heartbeat

Compute cosine similarity between two texts using high-dimensional sentence embeddings. Runs on-device. Includes human-readable interpretation.

Price: $0.030 USDC
Method: POST
Request body: { "text_a": string (required), "text_b": string (required) }
Response: { "success": true, "bundle": "live_vector_pruner", "data": { "similarity": number, "similarity_pct": number, "vector_dims": number, "interpretation": "distinct"|"related"|"very similar", "timestamp": number } }

---

# POST /api/v1/analysis/memory/entity-extractor
URL: https://lobre.lat/api/v1/analysis/memory/entity-extractor

Extract named entities from unstructured text. Entity types: PERSON, ORG, LOC, DATE, MONEY, PRODUCT, OTHER. Each entity includes confidence level.

Price: $0.060 USDC
Method: POST
Request body: { "text": string (required, max ~3000 chars) }
Response: { "success": true, "bundle": "live_vector_pruner", "data": { "entities": [{ "text": string, "type": "PERSON"|"ORG"|"LOC"|"DATE"|"MONEY"|"PRODUCT"|"OTHER", "confidence": "low"|"medium"|"high" }], "entity_count": number } }

---

# POST /api/v1/analysis/memory/context-ranker
URL: https://lobre.lat/api/v1/analysis/memory/context-ranker

Re-rank a list of text chunks by semantic relevance to a query. Returns chunks sorted by score descending.

Price: $0.050 USDC
Method: POST
Request body: { "query": string (required), "chunks": string[] (required, non-empty array) }
Response: { "success": true, "bundle": "live_vector_pruner", "data": { "ranked": [{ "index": number, "chunk": string, "score": number }], "query_vector_dims": number, "timestamp": number } }

---

# POST /api/v1/analysis/memory/bias-detector
URL: https://lobre.lat/api/v1/analysis/memory/bias-detector

Detect framing bias, sentiment slant, and loaded language in text. Returns bias types detected, specific examples, and overall bias score 0–100.

Price: $0.050 USDC
Method: POST
Request body: { "text": string (required, max ~3000 chars) }
Response: { "success": true, "bundle": "live_vector_pruner", "data": { "bias_detected": boolean, "bias_types": ("framing"|"sentiment"|"loaded_language"|"omission"|"selection")[], "confidence": "low"|"medium"|"high", "bias_score": number, "examples": [{ "phrase": string, "type": string, "explanation": string }], "summary": string } }

---

# POST /api/v1/analysis/memory/fact-linkage
URL: https://lobre.lat/api/v1/analysis/memory/fact-linkage

Verify a claim against fact-check databases. Falls back to AI analysis for claims not yet reviewed by human fact-checkers.

Price: $0.120 USDC
Method: POST
Request body: { "claim": string (required, max ~512 chars), "language": string (optional, default: "en") }
Response (fact_check_db source): { "success": true, "bundle": "live_vector_pruner", "data": { "source": "fact_check_db", "claims": [{ "claim_text": string, "claimant": string, "reviews": [{ "publisher": string, "url": string, "rating": string }] }], "verified": number, "timestamp": number } }
Response (ai source): { "success": true, "bundle": "live_vector_pruner", "data": { "source": "ai", "assessment": "likely_true"|"likely_false"|"misleading"|"unverifiable", "confidence": "low"|"medium"|"high", "reasoning": string, "timestamp": number } }
